title: AULE Metallic Burgundy Party Balloons: 50 Pcs 12 inch Chrome Maroon Party Balloons Shiny Thicken Dark Red Latex Helium Balloon for Graduation Wedding Valentine's Day Birthday Decoration
features: NEW METALLIC BALLOONS - The pack of 50 burgundy metallic balloons with helium is perfect for all kinds of party or anniversary decorations. We have a wide range of color options and styles available for you to choose from, allowing you the freedom to mix and match as you please

HIGH-QUALITY PARTY BALLOONS - The 12-inch burgandy latex balloons are made of high-quality latex and are safe for use around children. Each of these brown balloons weighs 2.8 grams and features a metallic surface that is brighter than ordinary latex balloons

BALLOONS CAN BE FILLED WITH - These maroon helium balloons can be filled with air, helium, and water. The inflated state of the dark red latex balloons can be maintained for at least 2 days. If filled with helium, the berry chrome balloons can remain in a floating state for 8-12 hours. Unique design of wine red eco-friendly balloons for the party

APPLICATIONS - The premium burgundy eco balloons are perfect party decorations, party accessories, party supplies, party essentials, party decor for graduation, wedding, valentine’s day, mother’s day, birthday party, bachelor party, and other party decorations in the new, fresh style
AFTER-SALES SERVICE - We are committed to providing the best service. If you have any problems during use, please contact us by email, we will try our best to address your issue
description: Product Description AULE Balloons The package of 50 metallised balloons with helium is perfect for any type of party or anniversary decoration. These balloons can be inflated with air, helium and water. The inflated condition of the yellow latex balloons can be maintained for at least 2 days. Why Choose Us: High-quality and safe party decorations. AULE Balloon has won the trust of thousands of satisfied customers. Our goal is to make every beautiful occasion a special day. The customer experience is our top priority. We have ten years of experience in designing decoration products and are committed to creating the most suitable decoration products for your parties, birthdays and events. Specifications Material: Natural latex Model: Metallic Balloons Colors: Available in 11 colours Gold / Green / Purple / Blue / Silver / Rose Gold / Lilac / Light Green / Black / Pink / Bordeaux Size: 30 cm / 13 cm (please confirm the product size before payment.)
